=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 11:67 - 22:2
Root: console.log(\n  Effect.runPromise(\n    Effect.ignore(\n      Effect.succeed(console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.log("Hello"))))\n    )\n  )\n)
